description: Controlled vocabulary of government functional domains. Links functionally equivalent entities across jurisdictions and name changes. A state rural development department in MP and its equivalent in Odisha share the same function_id. Referenced by registry_entities.json (function_ids[]) and registry_schemes.json (sector_function_id). Extracted from inline registry_entities.json function_vocabulary in v1.0 to allow independent versioning and referencing.
id_convention: SCREAMING-KEBAB with FUNC- prefix. e.g. FUNC-RURAL-DEV. IDs permanently stable.
usage_notes: Use function_ids[] on entity entries to tag all functional domains an entity covers.
Use sector_function_id on scheme entries for the primary functional domain of the scheme.
When adding a new function, add it here first, then reference it in the relevant registry entries.
Functions map to CAG audit wings approximately but are not the same as report_sector taxonomy — functions describe what an entity does, sectors describe what was audited.

description.en: Rural employment, roads, housing, and panchayati raj governance.
Public finance management, budget, treasury, and revenue administration.
Police, internal security, border management, and disaster management.
Public health, hospitals, family welfare programmes, and medical education.
Elementary and secondary school education, mid-day meals, and school infrastructure.
Universities, colleges, technical institutes, IITs, IIMs, and NIT network.
Crop production, horticulture, animal husbandry, fisheries, and food processing.
Dams, canals, groundwater management, flood control, and drinking water supply.
Forest management, wildlife conservation, environment protection, and pollution control.
Roads, bridges, government buildings, and state infrastructure construction.
Urban local bodies, housing schemes, slum development, and municipal services.
SC/ST welfare, women and child development, labour welfare, and disability programmes.
Power generation, transmission, distribution, renewable energy, and petroleum.
National and state highways, transport corporations, civil aviation, and shipping.
Land revenue, stamp duty, registration, land records, and land acquisition.
Telecom infrastructure, spectrum management, IT systems, and e-governance.
National and state planning, policy formulation, programme monitoring, and evaluation.
Supreme audit institution functions, accounts keeping, and internal audit oversight.
Oil and gas exploration, refining, distribution, and mineral extraction.
Labour welfare, industrial relations, employment exchanges, occupational safety, construction worker welfare, and enforcement of labour laws.
